word: G2256 - ἡμιώριον - hēmiṓrion - hay-mee-o'-ree-on - Half an hour

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἡμιώριον

- Transliteration: hemiorion

- Phonetic: hay-mee-o'-ree-on

- Definition:

1. half an hour

- Origin: from the base of G2255 and G5610

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: From the base of G2255 and G5610; a half hour: - half an hour.
